---
title: "Merge Plots by Study Site"
subtitle: "An R-driven workflow"
author: "Jacqueline Wu"
date: "2025-10-18"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

install.packages(c("readxl","dplyr","stringr","fs","writexl","readr","tidyr", "vroom"))  # Load required libraries, install if needed
library(vroom)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(fs)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
```
#### specify the data directory and list all “.xlsx” files
```{r}
dir_in <- "E:/merge_all/Hoh_"
dir_csv <- fs::path(dir_in, "csv")  
xlsx_files <- list.files(dir_in, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)
```
#### convert xlsx to csv due to xlsx size limit
```{r}
dir_out <- fs::path(dir_in, "csv")
fs::dir_create(dir_out)
xlsx_files <- list.files(dir_in, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)
xlsx_files <- xlsx_files[!grepl("^(~\\$|\\$)", basename(xlsx_files))]
if (!length(xlsx_files)) stop("No valid .xlsx files found in: ", dir_in)

converted <- vapply(xlsx_files, function(p) {
  tryCatch({
    sheets <- readxl::excel_sheets(p)
    sheet_to_read <- if ("MERGED_results" %in% sheets) "MERGED_results" else sheets[1]

    df <- readxl::read_excel(p, sheet = sheet_to_read, .name_repair = "unique")

    base <- fs::path_ext_remove(fs::path_file(p))
    out_path <- fs::path(dir_out, paste0(base, ".csv"))

    readr::write_csv(df, out_path)

    message("Wrote: ", out_path, "  (rows: ", nrow(df), ", cols: ", ncol(df), ")")
    TRUE
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Skipping ", basename(p), " -> ", conditionMessage(e))
    FALSE
  })
}, logical(1)
)
```
#### normalize the basename
```{r}
parse_from_csv_name <- function(path) {
  base <- fs::path_file(path)
  base <- fs::path_ext_remove(base)
  base <- sub("^(~\\$|\\$)", "", base)
  base <- sub("^.*\\$", "", base)
  base <- gsub("\\s+", "_", base)

  triplet <- sub("^([A-Za-z]+)(\\d{2,3})[_-](\\d{3}).*$", "\\1|\\2|\\3", base)
  
  parts <- strsplit(triplet, "\\|", fixed = FALSE)[[1]]
  if (length(parts) != 3 || any(is.na(parts))) {
    stop("Filename did not match expected pattern after normalization: ", base,
         "\nExpected like: Hoh92_603_01...csv")
  }

  tibble::tibble(
    study_site  = parts[1],
    plot_number = readr::parse_integer(parts[2]),
    aru_number  = readr::parse_integer(parts[3])
  )
}

```
#### helper function
```{r}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

add_date_hour <- function(df) {
  date_raw <- sub("^.*_(20\\d{6})_.*$", "\\1", df$source_file)

  time_raw <- sub("^.*_(\\d{6})\\D.*$", "\\1", df$source_file)

  df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      # character "YYYY-MM-DD"
      record_date = dplyr::if_else(
        grepl("^20\\d{6}$", date_raw),
        format(as.Date(date_raw, "%Y%m%d"), "%Y-%m-%d"),
        NA_character_
      ),
      record_hour = dplyr::if_else(
        grepl("^\\d{6}$", time_raw),
        suppressWarnings(readr::parse_integer(substr(time_raw %||% "", 1, 2))),
        NA_integer_
      )
    )
}
```
#### read each CSV, attach metadata from its file name, and derive date/hour
```{r}
csv_files <- list.files(dir_csv, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
csv_files <- csv_files[!grepl("^(~\\$|\\$)", basename(csv_files))]

parts <- lapply(csv_files, function(p) {
  tryCatch({
    meta <- parse_from_csv_name(p)
    
    df <- vroom::vroom(p, show_col_types = FALSE, altrep = TRUE, progress = FALSE)
    
    df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        study_site  = meta$study_site,
        plot_number = meta$plot_number,
        aru_number  = meta$aru_number,
        .before = 1
      ) |>
      add_date_hour()
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Skipping ", basename(p), " -> ", conditionMessage(e))
    NULL
  })
})
```
#### organize columns and write outputs
```{r}
all_merged <- dplyr::bind_rows(parts) |>
  dplyr::distinct() |>
  dplyr::relocate(study_site, plot_number, aru_number, record_date, record_hour, .before = 1) |>
  dplyr::arrange(study_site, plot_number, aru_number, record_date, record_hour, source_file)

message("Merged rows: ", nrow(all_merged), " from files: ", length(parts))

out_dir <- fs::path(dir_csv, "merged_output")
fs::dir_create(out_dir)

readr::write_csv(all_merged, fs::path(out_dir, "Hoh_ALL_plots.csv"))
```
